title: Frontend Batch 34 - Public Admin Gate Session Failure Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced public admin gate session failure and cache behavior so rejected session fetches, malformed payloads, failed checks, and non-admin roles hide admin affordances while public content remains visible.

validation.command: npx skills find react session cache failure gate testing
validation.notes: Results were general session/testing skills; no new skill was installed.

remainingGaps: Browser cookie/session transitions across page reloads remain better suited to Playwright once Docker/backend e2e is available.
Public admin affordance visibility on fully rendered public pages is partly covered by existing tests and can receive a focused route-level sweep if needed.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 35 - Public Admin Affordance Route Rendering Reinforcement.
